description: Digest of a partnership contract for a period of one year between Abū ʿAlī b. David and Netanʾel b. Nadiv. Written mainly in Judaeo-Arabic, but with some Arabic script mixed in. Each of the partners may take one dirham each day from the shop. The sums 150 (or rather 500-something?) and 500 wariq (dirhams) are mentioned in relation to each of the partners. On verso there are pen trials. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
